content: {"id":"fb_1782136269301_x0sjvr","signal":"positive","context":"2026-06-22 mac-yolo fan spike diagnosis on Igor’s MacBook Pro. Verified CLAUDE/GEMINI redirect to AGENTS, ran agent-session-start, npx thumbgate lessons, agent-decision-stack, yolo-health, launchctl, uptime/top/vm/simctl. Evidence: com.igor.shutdown-simulators LaunchAgent loaded with StartInterval 60s, last exit code 0, yolo-health 27 passed/0 failed; simruntime count 0 and no booted simulators; guard log showed real simulator shutdowns on 2026-06-21 at sim_procs 160-232 and Chrome Canary memory reclaims. Current fan pressure was not simulator runaway: load 5.32 to 4.16, CPU idle about 40-44%, swap 2233MB/3072MB, memory_pressure free 40%, top CPU Screen Sharing about 57-63%, WindowServer about 41-50%, CuaDriver about 45-46%, Codex about 38-42%, agy about 8-12%; Ollama runner held about 8.18GB RSS but below guard reclaim threshold/pressure gates. Manual guard run exited 0 and took no action because current conditions were outside auto-kill policy. Heuristic: answer narrowly that mac-yolo simulator guard is working, but it does not and should not auto-kill GUI/remote-control processes like Screen Sharing/CuaDriver/WindowServer or unknown active agents.","submittedContext":"2026-06-22 mac-yolo fan spike diagnosis on Igor’s MacBook Pro. Verified CLAUDE/GEMINI redirect to AGENTS, ran agent-session-start, npx thumbgate lessons, agent-decision-stack, yolo-health, launchctl, uptime/top/vm/simctl. Manual guard run exited 0 and took no action because current conditions were outside auto-kill policy. Heuristic: answer narrowly that mac-yolo simulator guard is working, but it does not and should not auto-kill GUI/remote-control processes like Screen Sharing/CuaDriver/WindowServer or unknown active agents.","relatedFeedbackId":null,"lastAction":null,"whatWentWrong":null,"whatToChange":"For future fan questions, report current culprit class separately from protected guard status; do not infer fan relief from simulator guard health alone.","whatWorked":"Combining live process/load evidence with yolo-health and guard log avoided a false all-clean claim.","reasoning":null,"visualEvidence":null,"conversationWindow":null,"distillation":null,"tags":["mac-performance","mac-freeze-rescue","diagnosis","simulator-guard","fan-spike","entity:Customer"],"skill":null,"failureType":null,"rubric":null,"actionType":"store-learning","actionReason":null,"structuredRule":null,"gateAction":null,"timestamp":"2026-06-22T13:51:09.301Z","richContext":{"domain":"general","filePaths":[],"errorType":null,"outcomeCategory":"standard-success","enforcement":{"scopeViolation":false,"approvalFailure":false,"protectedFileViolation":false,"protectedFiles":[]}}}
